name: Israel Corporation Ltd
summary: Israel Corporation Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the specialty minerals and chemicals, and refining and petrochemicals businesses in Europe, Asia, North America, South America, and internationally. The company offers bromine and bromine-based compounds; magnesia, calcium carbonate, and salt products; phosphorous-based products; potash, salt, polysulphate, and magnesium; phosphate rock and fertilizer-grade phosphoric acid; phosphate-based fertilizers; sulphuric and green phosphoric acids; and controlled release fertilizers, water soluble fertilizers, liquid fertilizers, and straights. It also provides bromine-based and phosphorus-based flame retardants; elemental bromine; clear brine fluids; industrial brominated biocides; inorganic bromides; phosphorus-based industrial compounds; MgCl2; and technical grade KCl products. In addition, the company produces fuel products; raw materials for the petrochemical industry; and materials for the plastics industry, as well as provides power and water, including steam services to various industries in Haifa. Its products are primarily used in the areas of agriculture, electronics, food, fuel and gas exploration, water purification and desalination, detergents, cosmetics, pharmaceuticals, and automotive. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
